workflows.name: Quarantine Asset and Raise Ticket
workflows.description: Playbook quarantine assets in FortiEDR and raise ticket in Service Now.

schema.title: Assets Discovered In Alerts

arguments.name: ServiceNow

params.short_description: The asset has been quarantined; please take the appropriate action.

message.content:
💡Note
Isolated the following assets on Fortinet FortiEDR and raised a ticket in ServiceNow to take further action: {{vars.result.data.result.number}}

{% for asset in vars.assetList %}

  • {{asset.hostname}}

{% endfor %}

{% endfor %}

workflows.name: Scenario - OT - Stuxnet Attack Scenario
workflows.description: Generate Alert for Stuxnet worm that targets Siemens S7 PLCs connected to Engineering Stations

steps.name: Create a Replication Through Removable Media_T0847 Alert

resource.name: Stuxnet peer to peer communication attempt
resource.description: A machine infected by Stuxnet has attempted to establish a communication with other potentially stuxnet infected machine via a malware-specific RPC-based peer to peer control. If the protocol negotiation is successful, also the other machine is infected by Stuxnet. It is advised to immediately quarantine and clean the Stuxnet infected machine.

step_variables.sourceDestinationIP: {% set ip = [] %}{% set _ = ip.append(vars.result.sourceIp) %}{% set _ = ip.append(vars.result.destinationIp) %}{{ip}}

resource.name: Communication between public and private networks
resource.description: A host with a public IP address has communicated with a host with a private IP address, and vice versa. Public IP addresses are typically used by devices that can be accessed via the internet and are not expected to communicate with private networks. Please confirm that this is a legitimate communication.

resource.name: STEP7 configuration download command
resource.description: Potentially dangerous STEP7 operation: the STEP7 master or an operator is downloading the software and/or hardware configuration into a PLC. This operation may be part of regular maintance, but can also be used in a cyber attack.

resource.name: Anomalous communication between two Windows XP machines
